creator: phillip-murphy@hotmail.com
text:
When the machine starts up (Mac G3 Clamshell), it begins to initiate
the loader. Then, all of a sudden, the screen goes black, displaying
this message:

Fatal Kernel Trap:

   exception                = 0x4 (instruction storage interrupt)
   virtual address          = 0x4d3fa8
   srr0                     = 0x4d3fa8
   srr1                     = 0x8003032
   curthread                = 0x570520
            pid = 0, comm =

panic: instruction storage interrupt trap
Uptime: 1s

How-To-Repeat: Turn on the computer.
